statusDefinition.severe-shortfall: Income is below 75% of the matched basic-needs threshold.
statusDefinition.unaffordable: Income is below the matched basic-needs threshold.
statusDefinition.pressured: Income is between 100% and 125% of the matched threshold.
statusDefinition.affordable: Income is at least 125% of the matched threshold.
statusDefinition.insufficient: A matched income or threshold is unavailable.
